name: claude-tiktok
description: TikTok-voice spoken summary when Claude Code needs your input.

api_key.title: Anthropic API key
api_key.description: Used for Haiku summarization. Get one at https://console.anthropic.com and load prepaid credits — Haiku 4.5 costs ~$0.0002 per summary. Billed separately from your Claude Code subscription. $5 buys roughly 25,000 summaries.
